themes.reasoning_notes: Explicit landfall trigger is the card's core gameplay hook, rewarding each land drop with repeatable board pressure.
It repeatedly turns your lands into creatures, directly enabling land-creature attacks and vigilance synergy.
Has an explicit landfall trigger that repeatedly converts each land drop into a temporary 3/3 attacker, making land entries its core engine.
Rewards a land-heavy game by animating lands and granting vigilance to land creatures, but it is not itself a manland.
